property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: createNewEmployee
testcase.system-out: [HRMS] Clicking Employment Type SVG trigger [HRMS] Employment Type options visible: 3 [HRMS] Clicked first Employment Type option [HRMS] Role input: force click ok [HRMS] Role DOM after click: {"server":0,"jk":0,"cb":0,"pdi":0} [HRMS] Role DOM after ArrowDown: {"cb":44,"pdi":0,"server":1} [HRMS] Clicked Role checkbox in div.server [HRMS] Submit buttons: 1 [HRMS] Button[0] class=submit-bar-disabled disabled= [HRMS] Submit button class before click: submit-bar-disabled [HRMS] Clicked submit button [HRMS] Submit button class after first click: submit-bar [HRMS] Button is enabled — clicking again to actually submit [HRMS] Total buttons after submit: 3 [HRMS] button[0] class=submit-bar text=Submit [HRMS] button[1] class=selector-button-border text=CANCEL [HRMS] button[2] class=selector-button-primary text=SUBMIT [HRMS] Found confirm button via: button.selector-button-primary[type='submit'] [HRMS] Success message text: Employee Created Successfully New Employee ID: smc-oy-hd-test01
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.
